_comment: DRAFT manifest for the official MCP registry (modelcontextprotocol/registry). VALIDATE against the current schema at https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/registry before submitting — field names (remotes/transport types) evolve. This server is REMOTE (hosted), not an installable package.
name: sh.tlaloc/tlaloc-mcp
description: Connect Claude, ChatGPT, and any AI assistant to official Mexican data: CURP (RENAPO), RFC (SAT), postal codes (SEPOMEX), phone numbers (IFT), and SPEI payment receipts/CEP (Banxico). Pay-per-call via SPEI.
